subcodes.title: Words to the Coopers, spoken on 1912-10-16
subcodes.first_line: You are all dear children of Mrs. [Ella Goodall] Cooper. She loves you with her heart and soul. In Persian language they say that such a person loves another
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @naming of children; of individuals, @unity in diversity, @suffering and imprisonment, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
